style: KnowSense / AI4Next stickman — white background, black line art, large expressive characters, one scene per voiceover beat. Paste into Gemini image generation, then optional Grok frame-to-video.

scenes.hook-worried: Worried office worker stick figure at desk facing AI robot. Speech bubble: Will AI replace my job? Large figures, white bg, black lines.
scenes.hook-laptop: Overwhelmed stick figure at laptop, inbox overload. Thought bubble: Too much. Cannot start.
scenes.hook-crowd: Five confused office workers, one on phone with AI app. Text: Zero training from employer.
scenes.hook-opportunity: Celebrating stick figure, lightbulb, text: THE GAP = YOUR OPPORTUNITY.
scenes.manager-talk: Two stick figures at desk. Bubbles: Can we use AI tools? / Smart question.
scenes.audience-lineup: Five workers (admin, marketing, CS, PM, you). Text: This playbook is for you.
scenes.action-start: Running stick figure, calendar Day 1 to Day 30. Text: Plan, not panic.
scenes.cta-point: Stick figure pointing at AI-PROOF JOB PLAYBOOK book. Link in description.
